description_long: This rectangular picnic basket features a tightly woven wicker exterior in a mix of gray and beige tones, giving it a modern yet rustic appearance. The basket has reinforced edges with a thicker, braided rim for added durability and visual interest. Both shorter sides are equipped with rectangular cut-out handles, integrated into the weave for easy carrying. The interior is spacious and open, with no visible lining or compartments, making it suitable for carrying various items. The weave pattern is consistent and uniform, contributing to the basket's sturdy structure. There are no visible lids, closures, or decorative embellishments beyond the natural texture of the woven material.
description: A rectangular, tightly woven wicker picnic basket in gray and beige tones with integrated cut-out handles and a reinforced braided rim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide face of the basket with a prominent braided rim and woven texture, no handle cut-out visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow face with a rectangular cut-out handle and the basket's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the wide woven surface and braided rim, no handle cut-out visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a rectangular cut-out handle, identical to the other side.
attribute_handle_type: Rectangular cut-out handles integrated into the short sides, fixed, formed by the woven structure.
attribute_weave_pattern: Plain, tight weave with a thicker braided rim along the top and bottom edges.
